name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_source_zone_fire_writeback_mcw
description: Fuel writeback repair probe: saved-world log source plus SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone footing, preflight-wielded charged lighter, normal player activation/targeting, a decisive player-message bridge immediately after turn advance and before save closure, and guarded saved fd_fire/smoke/light-relevant writeback. No debug fd_fire or synthetic map fields are injected.

steps.label: source_zone_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-zone fuel repair fixture is loaded on the map before any deploy/lighter macro runs.

steps.label: audit_saved_preflight_has_wielded_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: preflight saved player has an exact charged lighter item, is already wielding lighter, and has nested butane ammo available; this fixture setup replaces the brittle live wield-selector proof and does not claim inventory-selector coverage
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit apply-wielded lighter activation unless saved weapon is exactly lighter before live steps begin
steps.abort_reason: fixture/preflight did not provide a saved wielded lighter for the normal firestarter activation path

steps.label: audit_saved_source_tile_for_logs
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved source tile east of player contains real log item metadata before ignition
steps.preconditions: fixture save_transform added an oversized log pile on the intended light target; no fd_fire was injected
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit source-zone repair unless real saved-world wood items are present
steps.abort_reason: saved-world log source missing before lighter/fire proof

steps.label: audit_saved_source_firewood_zone_for_logs
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved zone metadata contains a broad SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone covering the log target and adjacent source area
steps.preconditions: fixture save_transform added a SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone over/around the log pile; this is fuel footing only, not Smart Zone Manager closure
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit source-zone repair unless saved zone metadata covers the log source area
steps.abort_reason: saved SOURCE_FIREWOOD zone metadata missing before lighter/fire proof

steps.label: audit_player_message_log_before_source_zone_ignition
steps.expected_visible_fact: baseline the saved player message log before normal lighter activation so later bridge evidence captures only new decisive lighting lines
steps.failure_rule: baseline only; this does not prove the fire path by itself

steps.label: activate_wielded_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: activate the already-wielded lighter through normal Apply/Wielded input so the game opens/continues the firestarter targeting flow
steps.preconditions: audit_saved_preflight_has_wielded_lighter proved saved weapon is lighter before live input; this step starts normal player apply-wielded firestarter path, not debug fd_fire placement

steps.label: target_source_zone_logs_with_wielded_lighter
steps.expected_visible_fact: target the adjacent source-zone/brazier/log area with the normally activated lighter; no debug fire placement is used
steps.failure_rule: if the source-firewood prompt appears and is not confirmed, or if the route does not lead to activity/fd_fire metadata, the ignition primitive remains untrusted
steps.next_step_gate: the saved fd_fire audit is the required gate before claiming player-lit fire
steps.preconditions: lighter is preflight-wielded and source-zone/log/f_brazier metadata audits are green

steps.label: advance_firestarter_activity_to_completion
steps.expected_visible_fact: A bounded turn advance lets the normal lighter/firestarter activity complete against the east log/source-zone target.

steps.label: audit_player_message_log_source_zone_ignition_success
steps.expected_visible_fact: narrow saved player-message bridge line proves the fire came from the normal lighting action path immediately after targeting/turn advance, before any save/writeback closure is attempted
steps.preconditions: normal lighter activation, source-zone targeting, and bounded firestarter turn advance have just run; baseline player-message log was recorded before activation
steps.next_step_gate: do not attempt save/fd_fire closure unless this normal-lighting action-path bridge is green; message evidence still does not substitute for saved fd_fire/smoke state
steps.abort_reason: no decisive player-message line for normal fire lighting appeared after the source-zone ignition attempt

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_source_zone_ignition_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after normal lighter/firestarter activity and before the post-ignition save is requested

steps.label: save_after_source_zone_ignition_request
steps.expected_visible_fact: Request save after the normal lighter/firestarter activity; current UI may open a case-sensitive save prompt before writing.
steps.failure_rule: This request is trusted only together with the following confirmation and saved-player mtime gate.

steps.label: confirm_save_after_source_zone_ignition
steps.expected_visible_fact: Confirm the case-sensitive save prompt after post-ignition save request; trust is deferred to saved-player mtime and saved-map metadata.
steps.failure_rule: If saved-player mtime does not advance after this confirmation, post-ignition writeback remains untrusted.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_source_zone_ignition_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after the post-ignition save confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-ignition save, proving the following saved-map audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_target_tile_for_fd_fire
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved target tile east of player contains actual fd_fire metadata after normal player lighter action against real log/source-zone footing
steps.preconditions: previous step saved after the normal player-action lighter route; no debug fd_fire transform is present in the fixture
steps.next_step_gate: player-lit fire/light writeback cannot close unless this metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: fd_fire target metadata missing after source-zone normal ignition route

steps.label: audit_saved_nearby_tile_for_smoke_or_fire_state
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved nearby tiles contain fd_smoke after the live fire route, while fd_fire remains the light source evidence
steps.preconditions: fd_fire writeback row was green before this optional smoke-relevance audit
steps.next_step_gate: if smoke is missing, report fd_fire/light green but smoke not yet closed; do not launder it into full smoke proof
steps.abort_reason: fd_smoke metadata missing after source-zone normal ignition route

recommended_test_command: python3 tools/openclaw_harness/startup_harness.py probe bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_source_zone_fire_writeback_mcw (writes source-zone, log, fd_fire, and smoke metadata gates; no debug fd_fire shortcut)
